CustomField.label: Patient
CustomField.description: Lookup to VS_Patient__c: the patient this notification concerns. Lookup (not Master-Detail) because notification-log retention (1 yr, Annexure C4) is shorter and independent of patient retention (up to 10 yr) — cascade delete would be wrong. Nullable: some notifications (e.g. generic system alerts) may not be patient-scoped. deleteConstraint SetNull chosen so deleting a patient does not block/cascade-delete historical notification logs; the log row survives with this lookup cleared for audit continuity.
